validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv && python -m uv sync --extra dev --python /usr/bin/python3.12
validated_commands.notes: Use pip install uv (not curl install). Use python -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-13: 7 failed (policy_status ANSI only), 8287 passed.

coverage_baseline.notes: 7 pre-existing failures: policy_status ANSI issue only.

monthly_activity_issue.notes: Do NOT create monthly issues - maintainer does not want them. Previously closed #1339, #1101, #1087.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex to strip before text assertions.
